title: Moddable Chess Engine
tagline: Consumer game SDK — 71 variants, MCP tools, ESM architecture, AI with opening books
description: Consumer game framework (v0.9.7). 71 chess variants plus a reusable SDK that powers non-chess games. Native ESM, MCP server with 8 AI-callable tools, multi-depth AI with opening books, postMessage embed API, tiered plugin architecture. Dungeon Chess runs entirely on MCE without engine forks.

title: Moddable Hexmaps
tagline: Seeded procedural hex maps — 6 games, Consumer SDK, MCP tools, PNG/PDF/SVG export
description: Hex map framework (v1.0.0) with seeded procedural generation, Consumer SDK (createMapController), 6 games, 4 render styles, PNG/PDF/SVG export, MCP tools, hex metadata, and URL parameter API.

title: PDF Pagination Engine
tagline: Intelligent document pagination with orphan prevention
description: Pagination system that measures rendered element heights, groups headings atomically, enforces page-fill minimums, and assembles multi-section documents. Powers 37 game families with 315 rule files producing 2,974 indexed pages. Pure DOM measurement, no wkhtmltopdf.

title: Ordit SDK
tagline: Open-source toolkit for Bitcoin Ordinals and Inscriptions
description: Indexer, parser, and API toolkit for Bitcoin Ordinals and Inscriptions. Multiple repos under the sadoprotocol organisation powering Ordzaar and third-party marketplaces.

title: SADO Protocol
tagline: Decentralised ordinals order-book standard for Bitcoin
description: Self-authenticating, decentralised order-book standard using IPFS for semi-signed transaction storage with on-chain content identifiers. Adopted by Ordzaar and third-party exchanges.

title: Everstore Protocol
tagline: Structured database functionality on UTXO blockchains (pre-EVM)
description: Complete relational database engine mapped onto BIP32 key derivation. CRUD, indexed lookups, three encryption tiers, immutable audit trails. All on-chain, published 2016 before EVM existed.

title: DN-Key Protocol
tagline: Decentralised key management via DNS TXT records
description: Key management standard using DNS TXT records to broadcast public keys. Adopted by ATA Plus ECF (2016), cited in SC Malaysia's capital markets blueprint (2018), reused in Oviato's chain-agnostic identity layer (2025).

title: Blockchain Embassy of Asia
description: ASEAN's first public blockchain consortium. Operated a private proof-of-authority EVM network with members from Maybank, RHB, Capital Bay, and ATA Plus.

title: BackPress
tagline: Standalone library extracted from WordPress core
description: Contributed to Automattic's BackPress framework — a standalone library extracted from WordPress core providing authentication, taxonomy, and option handling without the full WordPress stack.
